title: Top water polo schools meet
description: GEORGE NEWS - Glenwood House hosted a...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Glenwood House hosted a successful 2024 Co-eds water polo tournament from 26 to 30 September with 20 boys and 20 girls teams from across South Africa competing for the top spot.

In the boys final, Pearson High School from Gqeberha beat St Peters College from Johannesburg. In the girls final, Reddam Bedfordview from Johannesburg beat Kingswood College from Makhanda.


> The Glenwood House boys team finished seventh overall with their girls team finishing eighth.


The Glenwood House girls team managed to finish eighth out of 20 teams.

The Glenwood House boys team ended the tournament in seventh place out of 20 teams.

Final standings:

Girls final top 10 standings: 1. Reddam Bedfordview, 2. Kingswood College, 3. Pearson HS, 4. Stirling HS, 5. Reddam Umhlanga, 6. Thomas More College, 7. Hudson Park HS, 8 Glenwood House, 9. Beuileau College and 10. Crawford Lonehill.

Boys final top 10 standings: 1. Pearson HS, 2. St Peters College, 3. Reddam Helderfontein, 4. Stirling HS, 5. Woodridge College, 6. Steyn City School, 7. Glenwood House, 8. Reddam Umhlanga, 9. Reddam Bedfordview and 10. Crawford Lonehill.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
